colorMeta.intent: Task-first travel utility palette with teal for trust, coral for warm secondary action, gold for money highlights, and tinted slate neutrals.

primary.usage: Primary actions, selected states, focus affordances, active navigation.

accent.usage: Secondary warm action, recommendation highlights, rare emphasis.

background.usage: Page shell and travel-adjacent product backdrop.

surface.usage: Cards, panels, modals, and repeated surfaces.

border.usage: Default structure for cards, nav, tables, and form controls.

contrastNotes: Use brand-900 or brand-800 for body copy on light teal and surface panels.
Avoid light gray text on white or colored panels.
Advertisements use muted labels and clear separation, never CTA colors.

rules: Use display weight only for page-level titles.
Keep button and control labels compact, literal, and action-oriented.

shadows.rule: Repeated surfaces should use borders before large shadows.

motion.easing: ease-out for entry, ease-in-out for state changes
rules: Do not rely on hover-only disclosure.
Respect reduced motion by keeping transitions non-essential.
Mobile starts with one clear task path.
Desktop may show parallel choices, but no decision area should expose more than four equally weighted options without grouping.

components.name: Button
components.snippet: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-[8px] font-semibold focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-500

components.name: Input
components.snippet: rounded-[8px] border border-brand-200 bg-brand-50/30 focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-200

components.name: TopicCluster
components.snippet: compact task card with primary keyword pill, short title, description, and low-emphasis metadata

components.name: AdBanner
components.snippet: neutral region with explicit advertisement label and no CTA treatment

components.name: ToolPageShell
components.snippet: task header, interactive tool, post-tool ad, quick answer, steps, checklist, sources, FAQ, same-stage links

narrative.summary: TripKit should feel like a focused travel preparation workbench: fast to scan, reliable, and lightly warm without becoming a travel blog template.
antiPatternsFixed: Oversized shadows on repeated list items
Thin tool pages without extractable explanatory content
